name: @elizaos/voice-evidence-harness
description: Real-provider Definition-of-Done evidence capture harness for the realtime voice-session WebSocket contract (Deepgram Flux STT -> streaming LLM -> Cartesia Sonic TTS). Drives the REAL merged provider adapters against LIVE providers and captures every artifact the DoD demands (WS transcript, input/output audio, both-side logs, stage timings, post-interrupt frame-count assertion, domain artifacts, MP4). Harness-only; NOT a second production voice service.
